verses.text: Siampi lianpen ahi peuhpeuh mipa pen a mite' mawhna hangin Pasian' tungah biakna leh letsong a piaksak dingin ama mipihte lak panin kiteelin nasep a kiguan' ahi hi
Amah zong lam tampi-ah a ginalo thei mi mah ahih manin thu theilo mite leh a khial mite tungah lungnem takin na sem thei hi
Amah zong miginalo mi mah ahih manin mite' mawhna hangin biakna a pia hi bek loin ama mawhna mahmah hangin zong biakna a pia ahi hi

Tua bangin pahtawina a nei siampi lianpen nasep pen a semdingte amau utthu tawh a kisehtawm mawk hilo hi; siampi lianpen a sem dingin amahmah a kisehtawm hilo a, Aaron a kisap mah bangin Pasian in amah a seh ahi hi
Tua mah bangin Khrih zong, amahmah in siampi lianpen nasep a semtawm mawk hiloin Pasian in ama kiangah, “Nang, ka Tapa na hi hi. Tuni-in na Pa ka suak hi,” na ci hi
Mun dang khatah zong, “Melkhizedek siampi gui zui-in a tawntungin siampi na hi ding hi,” na ci lai hi
Leitungah mihingin Jesuh a omlai-in sihna panin amah a honkhia theiding Pasian tungah thu ngenin khitui naptui tawh thumin na kiko hi
Amah, Pasian' Tapa hinapi-in a thuakna tawh thumang ahih theihna ding a na kisin hi
Tua bangin a cingtaak mi a suahkhit ciangin ama thu a mang mite khempeuh-a' dingin tawntung hotkhiatna a kipatna hong suak a
Melkhizedek gui zui-in siampi lianpen dingin Pasian in a bawl hi.
Hih thu tawh kisai-in i gen ding tampi a om hangin note in thu thei hak mahmah na hih manun i gentel theihna ding haksa hi

Tu-in note pen midang a hilh dingin sia na suahtheih ding uh hun hikhin napi-in note mahmah pen Pasian' thu a bulpite hilhding na kisam lai uh hi. Antak nethei nailoin nawi bek a nethei lai na hi uh hi
Nawi bek a ne laite pen naungek ahih manin a man leh a manlo thu bangmah phawkthei nailo uh hi
Ahi zongin antak i cih pen a sia leh a pha a khenthei, a lim leh a limlo a khentheita, a khangham khinsa mite-a' ding ahi hi.
